configurations.name: tina4-server
runtimeArgs:
require 'tina4'; Tina4.get('/') { |req, res| res.html('

Welcome to Tina4 Ruby!

Simple. Fast. Human. This is not a framework.

API Endpoints

  • /api/hello - JSON greeting
  • /api/users/42 - Path parameters
  • /swagger - API Documentation
') }; Tina4.get('/api/hello') { |req, res| res.json({ message: 'Hello World!', framework: 'tina4_ruby', timestamp: Time.now.iso8601 }) }; Tina4.get('/api/users/{id:int}') { |req, res| res.json({ user_id: req.params['id'], name: 'Test User' }) }; app = Tina4::RackApp.new(root_dir: Dir.pwd); server = Tina4::WebServer.new(app, host: '0.0.0.0', port: 7145); server.start
